DP.208.0000:
OK, stand back and watch this.\f
Using the hidden move Rock Smash,
a boulder blocking your way...\f
DP.208.0001:
Fallen boulders need to be smashed
so they’re out of the way.\f
If you could get the Badge from
the Gym in town, you’d be able\r
to do this too.\f
Of course, you’d have to beat the
Gym Leader first. That’d be me!\f
DP.208.0005:
I met these MACHOP on Route 207.\f
They’ve now become my most trusted
partners!
